content:
💡 CodeMachine-CLI | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and standardizing complex, multi-step coding tasks by orchestrating AI agents into defined workflows.
✨ Key Features: • Orchestrates AI coding agents into workflows • Enables repeatable, long-running workflows • Supports multi-agent orchestration and communication • Allows for parallel execution of agents • Handles workflow persistence for long-running tasks
📖 Summary: CodeMachine-CLI is an open-source tool designed to orchestrate AI coding agents into repeatable, long-running workflows. It allows developers to define complex coding processes once and then execute them reliably, automating repetitive tasks and enabling multi-agent collaboration.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
